about.title: About Me
about.text: I live in Ankara. Since childhood, my fascination with technology has fueled my growth every single day. I started using a keyboard and mouse at just 4 or 5 years old, and my passion and curiosity have only deepened over time. While most people choose between following their heart or their career, I chose to fall in love with my work. Today, I continue my journey by developing high-end web and mobile applications.

passion.title: Passion for Tech & AI
passion.text: I stay deeply connected to artificial intelligence and emerging technologies. My interests extend beyond web and mobile development; I also dive into bot development and Linux systems. I even run several custom-built bots on a Raspberry Pi at home.

exp1.title: Front-end Developer
desc: Developing modern user interfaces using React.js and Next.js.
Focusing on performance optimization and scalable architectures.
Collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality web solutions.

exp2.title: Mobile App Developer
desc: Developing cross-platform mobile applications with React Native.
Managing mobile app lifecycles and deployment to store environments.
Implementing real-time data synchronization and API integrations.

exp3.title: Graphic Designer
desc: Designing brand identities and digital marketing assets.
Producing social media content and advertising materials.
Managing design workflows from concept to final production.

exp4.title: Web Designer
desc: Creating user-centric web designs and interactive prototypes.
Applying responsive design principles for various devices.
Developing UI component libraries and design systems.

edu1.title: Computer Programming
desc: Foundations of Information Systems and Computer Science.
Mobile and Web Application Development principles.
